allow: Bash(.venv/Scripts/python -c "import transformers, tokenizers; print\('transformers:', transformers.__version__\); print\('tokenizers:', tokenizers.__version__\)")
Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import pkg_resources; pkgs = [p.project_name for p in pkg_resources.working_set]; print\('\\n'.join\(sorted\(pkgs\)\)\)")
Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "from dotenv import load_dotenv; print\('dotenv ok'\)")
Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "from google import genai; print\('genai ok'\)")
